title: Representative Eval Sets, Deterministic Oracles, Baselines, and Versions · Program Forensics
summary: A preserved agent trajectory contains one plausible model, schema, tool, authority, state, loop, memory, concurrency, injection, evaluation, telemetry, deployment, or recovery defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in versioned representative agent evaluation corpus and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Sample normal, boundary, ambiguous, multilingual, accessibility, refusal, tool, failure, adversarial, and recovery cases from the intended task distribution.
Define exact schema, state, tool, argument, authorization, effect, citation, budget, stop, and recovery assertions wherever outcomes are deterministic.
Create changed-input, changed-policy, tool-fault, injection, memory-poisoning, approval, cancellation, and resource-exhaustion cases without leaking answers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Eval Version Provenance
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-eval-version-provenance-hxz48m" that uses case 8172 to build a versioned representative evaluation set with deterministic oracles, changed cases, adversarial cases, accessibility needs, and baselines. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

For Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Eval Version Provenance, keep Eval Version Provenance connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-eval-version-provenance-hxz48m
# Competency: agentpy-eval-version-provenance.
# Case 8172: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def evidence_agentpy_eval_version_provenance_hxz48m(eval_cases: int = 72, normal_cases: int = 30, boundary_cases: int = 18, adversarial_cases: int = 18, accessibility_cases: int = 6) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_hxz48m = "hxz48m-m84zxh-8172"
    assert evidence_variant_hxz48m
    evidence_axes_hxz48m = (
        "authorityhxz48m",
        "interaction8172",
        "toolm84zxh",
        "statehxz48m8172",
        "evaluation8172hxz48m",
        "recoverym84zxh8172",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_hxz48m)) == 6
    if eval_cases < 40:
        return False, eval_cases, "eval-depth"
    if normal_cases + boundary_cases + adversarial_cases + accessibility_cases != eval_cases:
        return False, normal_cases, "eval-reconciliation"
    if boundary_cases < 8 or adversarial_cases < 8:
        return False, adversarial_cases, "eval-risk-coverage"
    if accessibility_cases < 4:
        return False, accessibility_cases, "eval-accessibility"
    assert normal_cases + boundary_cases + adversarial_cases + accessibility_cases == eval_cases
    return True, eval_cases, "representative-agent-evals"
